org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class BaseCommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.AbstractCommand
      • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.BaseCommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable, Command

    public abstract class BaseCommand
extends AbstractCommand
    A command that groups a list of subcommands that can be executed separately.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected java.util.Map<java.lang.String,Command> subCommands
      The supported subcommands.

      • Fields inherited from class org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.AbstractCommand

        config, description, name, terminal, writer

      • Fields inherited from interface org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.Command

        EXIT_ERROR, EXIT_SUCCESS

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      protected BaseCommand(Context context, java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description)
      Creates a new base command to group subcommands.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected void addSubCommand(CommandFactory factory)
      Adds the given subcommand to the list of subcommands supported by this command.

      Creates and adds a new subcommand to the list of subcommands supported by this command.

      Executes the command with the give arguments.

      Gets a completer to generate tab-completion candidates of this command and its arguments.

      Prints a detailed description of what the command does.

    • Field Detail

      • subCommands

        protected java.util.Map<java.lang.String,Command> subCommands
        The supported subcommands.

    • Constructor Detail

      • BaseCommand

        protected BaseCommand(Context context,
                      java.lang.String name,
                      java.lang.String description)
        Creates a new base command to group subcommands.
        Parameters:
        context - the context of the shell session
        name - the name of the base command
        description - the description of the base command

    • Method Detail

      • execute

        public int execute(java.lang.String[] args)
        Description copied from interface: Command
        Executes the command with the give arguments. The command must support being interrupted by the user (by interrupting the caller thread).
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments. The command name is not part of the arguments.
        Returns:
        the exit status of the execution

      • addSubCommand

        protected void addSubCommand(java.lang.String name,
                             java.util.function.Function<java.lang.String[],java.lang.Integer> action,
                             java.lang.String description)
        Creates and adds a new subcommand to the list of subcommands supported by this command.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the subcommand
        action - the action to run when the the subcommand is executed
        description - the description of the subcommand
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if a subcommand of the given name already exists

      • addSubCommand

        protected void addSubCommand(CommandFactory factory)
        Adds the given subcommand to the list of subcommands supported by this command.
        Parameters:
        factory - the factory for a new subcommand of this command
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if a subcommand of the given name already exists

      • getCompleter

        public org.jline.reader.Completer getCompleter()
        Description copied from interface: Command
        Gets a completer to generate tab-completion candidates of this command and its arguments.
        Specified by:
        getCompleter in interface Command
        Overrides:
        getCompleter in class AbstractCommand
        Returns:
        the completer for the command

      • printHelp

        public void printHelp(java.io.PrintWriter printer)
        Description copied from interface: Command
        Prints a detailed description of what the command does.
        Specified by:
        printHelp in interface Command
        Overrides:
        printHelp in class AbstractCommand
        Parameters:
        printer - where to print the help text

      • close

        public void close()
           throws java.lang.Exception
        Specified by:
        close in interface java.lang.AutoCloseable
        Overrides:
        close in class AbstractCommand
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception
